items.name: Cozy Yellow Sweater
items.description:
https://www.roblox.com/catalog?Keyword=sweater&Category=1&CreatorName=dubit&CreatorType=Group&salesTypeFilter=1


 
Wrap yourself in warmth and sunshine with our 'Cozy Yellow Sweater'! This soft and inviting sweater is the epitome of comfort and style. Its sunny shade of yellow will brighten even the gloomiest of days, while its snug fit keeps you warm and snug. Whether you're lounging at home or stepping out in style, this sweater is the perfect choice. Embrace the cozy vibes and add a touch of sunshine to your wardrobe with our 'Cozy Yellow Sweater'.
